sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (name String, value UInt32, timestamp DateTime, nullable_value Nullable(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
SELECT count(*) / (SELECT count() FROM test_data) FROM hdfsCluster('cluster_simple', 'hdfs://hdfs1:9000/{some,another}_dir/some_file_{1..3}', 'TSV', 'name String, value UInt32');
SELECT name, value, nullable_value / (SELECT max(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) as normalized_value FROM test_data WHERE nullable_value IS NULL;
SELECT name, avg(value) / max(nullable_value) as avg_norm FROM test_data GROUP BY name HAVING avg_norm > 0.5;
SELECT SUM(value) / (SELECT count(nullable_value) FROM test_data WHERE nullable_value IS NOT NULL) as avg_without_nulls FROM test_data;

SELECT name, value, (SELECT count(*) FROM hdfsCluster('cluster_simple', 'hdfs://hdfs1:9000/{some,another}_dir/*', 'TSV', 'name String, value UInt32')) AS file_count FROM test_data WHERE value / 100 > 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_records AS SELECT *, toNullable(value / 2) AS processed_value FROM test_data WHERE timestamp > '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT name, processed_value FROM temp_records WHERE processed_value IS NOT NULL HAVING processed_value > (SELECT avg(value) FROM test_data WHERE value > 100) / 2;
SELECT name, (value * 2) / (00.0 + 1) AS safe_division FROM test_data WHERE value > 0;
